---
title: "教程"
---
```{=html}
<style>
  /* ================================================================
     Forest Canopy Theme — Tutorial Grid (with image cards)
     Aligned with: LCZ4r landing page · custom-modern.css · style.css
     Tokens: #f8faf7 bg · #1a2e1a text · #10b981 primary · #0ea5e9 sky
  ================================================================ */
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
  :root {
    --fc-bg-page:       #f8faf7;
    --fc-bg-card:       rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90);
    --fc-bg-elevated:   #e6ede4;
    --fc-primary:       #10b981;
    --fc-primary-dark:  #059669;
    --fc-sky:           #0ea5e9;
    --fc-text-main:     #1a2e1a;
    --fc-text-body:     #4a6741;
    --fc-text-muted:    #8aaa82;
    --fc-border:        rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.18);
    --fc-border-hover:  rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.55);
    --fc-shadow:        0 4px 24px -4px rgba(16, 40, 16, 0.10);
    --fc-shadow-hover:  0 16px 48px -8px rgba(16, 40, 16, 0.20);
    --fc-radius:        16px;
    --fc-radius-sm:     8px;
    --fc-transition:    0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  }
  .tutorial-grid-container {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background-color: var(--fc-bg-page);
    color: var(--fc-text-main);
    padding: 2rem 1rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .tutorial-header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .tutorial-header h1 {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 2.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--fc-text-main);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .tutorial-header p {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    color: var(--fc-text-body);
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .tutorial-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
  }
  .tutorial-card {
    background-color: var(--fc-bg-card);
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius);
    border: 1px solid var(--fc-border);
    box-shadow: var(--fc-shadow);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--fc-transition);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
  }
  .tutorial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-8px);
    box-shadow: var(--fc-shadow-hover);
    border-color: var(--fc-border-hover);
  }
  .card-image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 16 / 8;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .card-image-wrapper img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease-out;
  }
  .tutorial-card:hover .card-image-wrapper img {
    transform: scale(1.05);
  }
  .card-image-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--fc-bg-card) 20%, transparent 100%);
  }
  .card-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
    right: 12px;
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2);
    color: var(--fc-text-main);
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 99px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .card-body {
    padding: 1.75rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex-grow: 1;
  }
  .card-icon {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius-sm);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f5e9, #d1fae5);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    transition: transform var(--fc-transition);
  }
  .tutorial-card:hover .card-icon {
      transform: rotate(-10deg) scale(1.05);
  }
  .card-icon svg {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    color: var(--fc-primary-dark);
  }
  .card-title {
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--fc-text-main);
  }
  .card-description {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--fc-text-body);
    line-height: 1.6;
    flex-grow: 1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .card-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--fc-primary-dark);
    text-decoration: none;
    margin-top: auto;
  }
  .card-cta svg {
    width: 1.2em;
    height: 1.2em;
    margin-left: 0.5rem;
    transition: transform var(--fc-transition);
  }
  .tutorial-card:hover .card-cta svg {
    transform: translateX(4px);
  }
  .github-feedback-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: var(--fc-radius-sm);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--fc-primary), var(--fc-sky));
    color: white;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2);
    transition: all var(--fc-transition);
    margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .github-feedback-btn:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
    color: white;
  }
  .github-feedback-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .tutorial-header h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
    .tutorial-header p { font-size: 1rem; }
    .tutorial-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
<div class="tutorial-grid-container">
  <div class="tutorial-header">
    <h1>教程</h1>
    <p>通过这些分步指南，探索 LCZ4r 的强大功能，从基础知识到高级应用。</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tutorial-grid">
    <a href="https://lcz-rast.github.io/lcz-tutorial/" target="_blank" class="tutorial-card">
      <div class="card-image-wrapper" onerror="this.parentElement.style.display='none'">
        <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/main/vignettes/fig_general_1_1.png" alt="LCZ Map of São Paulo">
        <div class="card-image-overlay"></div>
        <div class="card-badge">基础</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-icon">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6.042A8.967 8.967 0 006 3.75c-1.052 0-2.062.18-3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 016 18c2.305 0 4.408.867 6 2.292m0-14.25a8.966 8.966 0 016-2.292c1.052 0 2.062.18 3 .512v14.25A8.987 8.987 0 0018 18a8.967 8.967 0 00-6 2.292m0-14.25v14.25" /></svg>
        </div>
        <h3 class="card-title">LCZ4r 入门</h3>
        <p class="card-description">学习使用 LCZ4r 的基础知识。本教程涵盖了如何下载、可视化和分析局地气候区 (LCZ) 地图，是新用户的理想起点。</p>
        <div class="card-cta">
          开始教程
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 8.25L21 12m0 0l-3.75 3.75M21 12H3" /></svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://lcz-rast.github.io/lcz-rap/" target="_blank" class="tutorial-card">
      <div class="card-image-wrapper" onerror="this.parentElement.style.display='none'">
        <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/main/vignettes/fig_local_uhi_2.png" alt="UHI Time Series Analysis">
        <div class="card-image-overlay"></div>
        <div class="card-badge">RAPs</div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-icon">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.5 6a7.5 7.5 0 100 15 7.5 7.5 0 000-15z" /><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197" /></svg>
        </div>
        <h3 class="card-title">案例研究：RAPs</h3>
        <p class="card-description">探索使用 LCZ4r 进行的真实世界案例研究。本节重点介绍与健康相关的应用，展示如何将 LCZ 数据与流行病学信息相结合。</p>
        <div class="card-cta">
          查看案例研究
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.25 8.25L21 12m0 0l-3.75 3.75M21 12H3" /></svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 3rem;">
    <a href="https://github.com/ByMaxAnjos/LCZ4r/issues/new/choose" target="_blank" class="github-feedback-btn">
      <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0016 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8z"></path></svg>
      提供反馈或报告问题
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
